title: Why Did Xi Jinping Meet the Fake Panchen Lama?
description: China’s President waited a decade before meeting the highly loyal religious leader. The encounter was likely related to the Dalai Lama’s succession.
snippet:
Why Did Xi Jinping Meet the Fake Panchen Lama?

Xi Jinping and other CCP top bureaucrats “receive” the false Panchen Lama on June 6. Source. Government of t...
